resources.string: Contacts permission is required to import customers
Payment not found or already voided
No ledger entries in this range.
This keeps the payment but removes it from totals.
Missing customer details for this payment.
No open orders for this customer.
Customer has %1$s in credit. Apply it to %2$s?
Follow this once, then run daily without guessing where tools are.
Bottom tabs: Calendar, Orders, Customers, Money.
More sheet: Notes history, Floating helper, Backup, Tutorial.
M-PESA share: Messages app -> select message -> Share -> OrderBook.
Use Calendar to plan the day
Tap a day to view orders. Long-press a day or tap + to add a new order quickly.
Use Orders to see who still owes money and record payment follow-up fast.
Use Customers to call/message, view balances, and open full customer history.
Use Collect for M-PESA import. From Messages, share M-PESA SMS directly to OrderBook and it opens Money - Collect. Use Record for manual cash/M-PESA entries.
Use Notes history for quick lookups
Open More -> Notes history to find saved numbers, amounts, and voice captures instantly.
Open More -> Floating helper and keep it enabled for fast voice note and calculator capture while using other apps.
Set backup target and enable reminders so records stay safe and follow-ups are never missed.
Open this feature, try it briefly, then continue to the next step.
Tip: Reopen this anytime from More -> Beginner tutorial.
Use Calendar as your daily base. Plan work, open days, and track what is due.
Tap + to add an order quickly. This same order later appears in Orders, Customers, and Money.
Orders is your follow-up list. Open it daily to focus on who still owes.
Start from this summary, then use filters or swipe actions to clear pending balances faster.
Open any customer to view statement, receipt history, and communication options in one place.
Use filter and sort controls to prioritize follow-ups, then long-press a customer for quick actions.
Use Money for both imported M-PESA collections and manual payment records.
Collect tab for shared M-PESA messages
From Messages app: select message -> Share -> OrderBook. It opens here for matching and apply.
Record tab for manual payment entry
Choose customer, enter amount, save, then verify the change from statement or receipt history.
Receipt history supports move and void
Practical flow: record payment, open receipt history, swipe right to move allocation or swipe left to void with reason.
Use More for Notes history, Floating helper, backup, and tutorial without hunting in settings.
This is the fastest place to find saved numbers, amounts, and voice captures while working.
Use search and actions in Notes
Search by text, number, or amount. Use note menu to copy, share, pin, edit, call, or delete.
Use helper for quick voice calculator and note capture while you are inside other apps.
Turn this on, then grant microphone and overlay permissions when prompted for reliable capture.
Run this sequence daily: add work, follow unpaid, collect or record payment, verify history, and capture notes quickly.
Pick a date on the calendar
Tap any day to choose where you want to add a booking.
Tap the + button to open quick add for the selected day.
Search existing customers or type a new name for this booking.
Describe items or service notes so the order is clear.
Type the amount to charge. Use a positive value to continue.
Tap Save to create your first booking and finish this tutorial.
Orders, payments, and customers in one place
Run bookings and payments from one place
Set up once, then use Calendar as your daily dashboard for orders, customers, and balances.
See your bookings at a glance
Calendar is your home. Open any day and manage work quickly.
Record money, view balances, and understand each customer account clearly.
Set backup once, then keep your records safe as your business grows.
Complete required step first. Optional steps can be done now or later.
Complete this required step to continue.
Set business name, currency, and timezone.
Choose a backup file and keep restore ready from day one.
Optional: bring existing customer contacts into the app.
Optional: enable due reminders and daily summary notifications.
Optional: capture quick voice notes and calculations over other apps.
Automatic backup is enabled after selecting this file.
Allow contacts, then import the customers you want right away.
Permission granted. Complete setup by importing selected contacts.
Contacts imported. You can add more anytime from More.
Enable reminders now to avoid missed due-date follow-ups.
Enable helper now, or use notification-only fallback.
This information appears in key workflows and keeps totals consistent.
Importing contacts helps you add customers in seconds, like WhatsApp contact sync.
We read names and phone numbers only to create customer entries you choose.
We do not upload your contacts to a server and we do not message anyone automatically.
Turn on due reminders and daily summary so follow-ups are never missed.
Notifications keep orders and balances visible during busy days.
We only show local app reminders. No promotional alerts.
Microphone access lets the helper capture your spoken notes and calculations.
Voice capture starts only when you tap Voice note or Voice calculator.
The app does not record audio in the background automatically.
Allow floating helper over other apps?
Overlay access shows a helper bubble while you use WhatsApp, Instagram, or other apps.
This helps you capture information without switching apps.
You can turn this off anytime from More > Floating helper.
Archived customers are hidden from lists, but their history stays.
This customer has no transactions and will be removed permanently.
Imported contacts have no orders yet
Contacts are saved. Show them now or add first orders from Calendar.
Adjust filters or clear them to see more customers.
Import contacts to start managing customer orders.
No product quantities found in order notes.
Separate each message with a blank line.
No backups found for selected location
Could not keep file permission. Pick the backup file again.
Selection saved, but Android did not grant persistent access. Re-link if backup fails later.
Strict mode verifies backup manifest checksums before restore.
Use Legacy only when restoring very old backups that do not contain a manifest.
Folder permission is missing or revoked. Re-select backup folder.
Folder exists but is not currently accessible. Check provider app/network and retry.
Save backup to Drive; each run updates the same selected backup file.
Create a backup now and keep automatic backup on.
Waiting for a healthy backup file link
Select a backup and restore after preview.
Restoring replaces all current app data.
No file selected. Restore will use your latest backup.
This is irreversible and replaces all current customers, orders, and payments.
Encrypt backup files with your passphrase before they are saved.
Plain backups are easier to recover but expose data if copied outside your device.
Keep this passphrase safe. Backup restore will fail without it.
Encryption is enabled but no passphrase is configured yet.
Passphrase must be at least 8 characters.
Notification permission is required on Android 13+.
One notification each morning with totals.
Reminders run with WorkManager (no exact alarms).
Import customers from your phonebook. We skip empty numbers automatically.
Grant permission to load your phonebook and pick who to import.
Unable to read contacts right now. Please try again.
Select at least one contact to import.
No contacts found on this device.
All caught up! No unpaid orders.
Swipe right to pay, left to delete
This will cancel the order and remove it from unpaid totals.
This order has %1$s paid. Deleting will cancel the order and keep paid money as customer credit.
Tip: Tap a day to view details. Long-press to add an order.
No orders found for this customer.
Swipe right to move, left to void
Tap + to add the first order.
Try a different name or note.
All orders are paid or partial.
No orders are fully paid yet.
This will remove all typed values for this order entry.
%1$s will be cancelled and removed from totals.
No payments are linked to this order.
Select payments to move or delete.
No customer on this order. Choose a target order.
This will remove the order and leave receipts unchanged because none are linked.
Select at least one payment to continue.
Choose where selected payments should be moved before deleting this order.
%1$d payment(s), total %2$s, will move to %3$s when this order is deleted.
%1$d payment(s), total %2$s, will be deleted with this order.
You will be asked before applying credit to new orders.
This will %1$s the order regardless of payment state.
This will mark the remaining balance as an adjustment.
Orders, payments, and bad debt entries will appear here.
This reduces what the customer owes.
Action required to keep backups running
Persistent controls for quick voice note and calculator capture
Automatic backup is failing. Open backup settings to re-link the folder.
Tap the bubble to capture voice notes or calculations.
Overlay access is off. Use notification actions for voice capture.
Capture notes and calculations quickly while using other apps.
Microphone permission is required for voice capture.
Speech recognition is unavailable on this device.
Voice capture could not start. Try again.
Could not understand this calculation. Try again.
Could not capture voice. Try again.
Use Voice note or Voice calculator to save entries.
